mth_budget_midlow.row_predicate: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" > 6.0 AND "qty" <= 20.0) OR (rowid IN (26,28,29,30,32)))

mth_budget_midhigh.row_predicate: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" > 20.0 AND "qty" <= 40.0) OR (rowid IN (41,42,43,46,47)))

monthly_budget_lowest_quartile.row_predicate: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" <= 6.0) OR (rowid IN (14,18,19,20,21)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where position > 24 or is NULL
rows where activity = P or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" > 42.0 AND "qty" <= 48.0) OR ("qty" > 48.0 OR "qty" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 42.0 < qty <= 48.0 + rows where qty > 48.0 or is NULL
rows where qty > 88 or is NULL

predicate_sqls: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" <= 6.0) OR (rowid IN (14,18,19,20,21)))
(("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" > 6.0 AND "qty" <= 20.0) OR (rowid IN (26,28,29,30,32)))

monthly_budget.predicate_sql_fragment_A: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" <= 6.0) OR (rowid IN (14,18,19,20,21)))
monthly_budget.predicate_sql_fragment_B: (("qty" IS NOT NULL AND "qty" > 6.0 AND "qty" <= 20.0) OR (rowid IN (26,28,29,30,32)))

fragment_roles: rows where qty > 39 or is NULL

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
